companyName: Oaktree Capital Group, LLC 6.625% PFD UT A
description: Brookfield Oaktree Holdings LLC formerly Oaktree Capital Group LLC is an alternative asset manager involved in investing in credit, real assets, private equity, and listed equities. It operates into one segment namely the Investment management business which consists of the services that it provides to clients. It operates in the United States where it generates the majority of its revenue.
